legalPublic.notPublishedBody: This document hasn't been published yet. Please check back later.

dealRoom.title: Deal Room
dealRoom.subtitle: Manage and track all your mortgage deals
dealRoom.searchPlaceholder: Search by deal # or client name...
dealRoom.noDealsFilter: Try adjusting your search or filter criteria
dealRoom.noDealsEmpty: Start by creating your first mortgage deal
dealRoom.deleteDraftConfirm: This permanently deletes this draft deal. This action cannot be undone.

newDeals.title: New Deals
newDeals.subtitle: Recently submitted deals — sorted by closing date. COF-specified deals appear first.
newDeals.searchPlaceholder: Search by deal #, city, province, property type…
newDeals.fResidencyHint: Check if you do NOT want the residency type included:
newDeals.fIncomeTypeHint: Check if you do NOT want the income type included:
newDeals.fOthersHint: Check if you do NOT want the program/product included:
newDeals.saveFilterDesc: Give this filter a name to reuse it from the Saved Filters bar and Settings.
newDeals.statsTotal: {count} deals total · sorted by closing date (COF priority)
newDeals.statsMatching: {count} deals matching filters · sorted by closing date (COF priority)
newDeals.noDealsHint: Try adjusting your filters or search term.
newDeals.privacyNotice: Broker contact details, client name, and full property addresses are not disclosed at this stage.
newDeals.declineDesc: The broker will not be notified. You can still view declined deals by refreshing your filter. This action can be reversed by the platform administrator if needed.
newDeals.messageDesc: Your message will be forwarded to the broker(s) via the platform. Your identity as a lender will not be disclosed at this stage.
newDeals.contactBlocked: Your message can't contain {reason}. Please remove it and try again.
newDeals.selectAllOnPage: Select all deals on this page

maturingDeals.title: Maturing Deals
maturingDeals.subtitle: Deals with no offers approaching their closing date — sorted by urgency. Row color indicates match with your saved filters.
maturingDeals.legendTitle: Filter match legend — scored against your saved filters
maturingDeals.desc90: High priority — strongly matches your criteria
maturingDeals.desc80: Good match — a few criteria differ
maturingDeals.descLow: Low alignment with your saved filters
maturingDeals.searchPlaceholder: Search by deal #, city, province, property type…
maturingDeals.statsTotal: {count} maturing deals · sorted by closest closing date
maturingDeals.statsMatching: {count} maturing deals matching search · sorted by closest closing date
maturingDeals.noDealsHint: No open deals are approaching maturity right now.
maturingDeals.selectAllOnPage: Select all deals on this page
maturingDeals.privacyNotice: Broker contact details, client name, and full property addresses are not disclosed at this stage.
maturingDeals.declineDesc: You will pass on this deal. The broker will not be notified. This action is reversible by contacting platform support.
maturingDeals.messageDesc: Your message will be forwarded to the broker anonymously. Your identity as a lender will not be disclosed until your offer is accepted.
maturingDeals.contactBlocked: Your message can't contain {reason}. Please remove it and try again.

expiredDeals.title: Expired Deals
expiredDeals.subtitle: Deals that expired after 15 days without an accepted offer. Read-only archive.
expiredDeals.infoBanner: Expired deals are read-only and cannot receive new offers. {days} days after expiring they are removed from this view and archived for internal tracking and analytics.
expiredDeals.expiringAlert: {count} deal(s) will be removed from this view within 7 days and will no longer be visible here.
expiredDeals.searchPlaceholder: Search by deal #, city, province, property type…
expiredDeals.readonlyNotice: This view is read-only. Expired deals cannot receive new offers. Broker contact details, client name, and property addresses are not disclosed.

submittedOffers.title: Submitted Offers
submittedOffers.subtitle: Deals where you have sent an offer — track status and broker responses in real time.
submittedOffers.searchPlaceholder: Search by deal #, city, province, property type…
submittedOffers.noOffersEmpty: You haven't submitted any offers yet.
submittedOffers.noOffersFilter: Try adjusting your search or status filter.
submittedOffers.acceptedBanner: Your offer was accepted. The broker will confirm to finalize the deal.
submittedOffers.withdrawDesc: The offer will be marked as withdrawn. The broker will no longer be able to accept it. This action cannot be undone — you would need to submit a new offer if you change your mind.
submittedOffers.messageDesc: Your message will be forwarded to the broker via the platform. Your identity as a lender will not be disclosed at this stage unless your offer is accepted.

dealDetail.notFound: Deal not found, or you don't have access to it.
dealDetail.surveyClosedTitle: This deal has closed — please complete a quick survey.
dealDetail.surveyClosedBody: A few questions about how it went with {lender}. Takes under a minute.
dealDetail.listedByArrival: Listed by order of arrival (oldest first)
dealDetail.noOffersBody: Lenders haven't submitted offers on this deal.
dealDetail.acceptBody: You're about to accept this offer. Other pending offers will be declined. You can still switch (up to 2 times per month) before confirming the lender.
dealDetail.toastAccepted: Offer accepted. Confirm the lender to generate the invoice.
dealDetail.toastSwitched: Acceptance undone. Offers are back in review.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.subtitle: Lender fee invoices for funded deals
invoices.overdueAlert: You have {count} overdue invoice(s). Please remit payment or contact {email} to avoid service interruptions.
invoices.pendingEmptyBody: No pending invoices at this time.
invoices.pdfError: Could not generate the invoice PDF.
invoices.infoBanner: Invoices are generated automatically when a funded deal is confirmed. For billing inquiries contact {email}. Cancelled invoices are retained for audit purposes.
invoices.changesIntro: Modify term, loan amount, or closing date. The lender fee recalculates instantly based on {bps} bps applied.
invoices.markPaidBody: Confirm that payment for {invoice} has been received. This action will move the invoice to the Paid tab and cannot be undone.
invoices.cancelBody1: You are about to cancel invoice {invoice}.
invoices.cancelBody2: Did this loan not fund and will it not be funded?
invoices.cancelBody3: If confirmed, this invoice will be voided and moved to Cancelled. This action cannot be undone.

notifications.newOfferDesc: When a lender submits an offer on one of your deals.
notifications.dealExpiringDesc: When a submitted deal nears or reaches its 15-day expiry.
notifications.offerAcceptedDesc: When a broker accepts one of your offers.
notifications.filterMatchDesc: When a newly submitted deal matches one of your saved filters.
notifications.messageBrokerDesc: When a lender messages you on a deal thread.
notifications.messageLenderDesc: When a broker messages you on a deal thread.
notifications.inappDesc: Master switch for the notification bell.
notifications.emailDesc: Also send these by email (email delivery is enabled at deployment).

notificationCenter.title: Notifications
notificationCenter.subtitle: Stay on top of activity across your deals.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account preferences and lender access.
settings.blockingIntro: Blocked lenders will not receive your deal submissions and cannot send you offers.
settings.emailChangeNote: You'll get a 6-digit code at the new address; enter it here to apply the change.
settings.emailCodeBody: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to {email}.
settings.errVerifyEmail: Could not confirm the code. It may be invalid or expired.
settings.sameEmail: Enter an email different from your current one.
settings.pwTooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters.
settings.blockDesc: This lender will not receive your future deal submissions and will not be able to send you offers. You can unblock them at any time from this page.
settings.unblockDesc: This lender will be able to receive your deal submissions and send you offers again.

lenderSettings.title: Settings
lenderSettings.subtitle: Manage your account preferences and deal flow settings.
lenderSettings.brokerageIntro: Deals submitted by blocked brokerages will not appear in your New Deals or Maturing Deals queues. You can unblock a brokerage at any time.
lenderSettings.blockDesc: Deals submitted by this brokerage will no longer appear in your deal queues. You can unblock them at any time from this page.
lenderSettings.unblockDesc: Deals from this brokerage will start appearing in your deal queues again.
lenderSettings.skipDeclineDesc: When enabled, declining a deal will not ask for confirmation. Automatically re-enables after 24 hours. Use this when processing a large batch of declines.
lenderSettings.showOfferSummaryDesc: Display a review step with the full offer breakdown before the offer is sent to the broker.
lenderSettings.savedFiltersIntro: Define the criteria that score your Maturing Deals. Active filters are matched against every deal; only the criteria you set count toward the match %.
lenderSettings.noFiltersHint: Create one to start scoring maturing deals.
lenderSettings.weightedHint: Weighted criteria — leave a field as “Any” / blank to exclude it from scoring.
lenderSettings.deleteDesc: This filter and its notification settings will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
lenderSettings.pwTooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters.

signIn.subtitle: Sign in to access your secure lending portal.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a 6-digit code to set a new password.
forgotPassword.error: Could not send the reset email.
forgotPassword.codeBody: We sent a 6-digit code to {email}. Enter it below with your new password.
forgotPassword.codeInvalid: Enter the 6-digit code from your email.
forgotPassword.tooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
forgotPassword.resetError: Could not reset your password. The code may be invalid or expired.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
resetPassword.tooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
resetPassword.invalidLink: This link is invalid or has expired.
resetPassword.invalidResetLink: This password reset link is invalid or has expired.

pendingApproval.rejectedBody: Your lender registration was not approved by an administrator.
pendingApproval.pendingBody: Your lender account is awaiting administrator approval. You'll be notified by email once it's approved — then you can sign in and start browsing deals.

accessDenied.title: You don't have permission
accessDenied.body: Your account doesn't have access to this page. Sign in with an account that has the right permissions.

messagesInbox.declineConfirmDesc: This removes the deal from your feeds and deletes this chat. This can't be undone.
messagesInbox.noThreads: No messages yet. Threads appear here when a lender messages about a deal.
messagesInbox.selectSub: Pick a thread on the left to read and reply.
messagesInbox.identityHint: identities stay hidden until the offer is accepted
messagesInbox.inputPlaceholder: Write a message…  (no contact info until the deal is accepted)
messagesInbox.contactBlocked: Your message can't contain {reason}. Please remove it and try again.

faqView.subtitleBroker: Answers to the most common questions from mortgage brokers on our platform.
faqView.subtitleLender: Answers to the most common questions from lenders on our platform.
faqView.noResults: No results found. Try a different keyword.
faqView.noQuestionsEmpty: FAQs will appear here once published.
faqView.noQuestionsFilter: Try searching with different keywords or browse all topics.
faqView.ctaTitle: Can’t find what you’re looking for?
faqView.ctaSubtitle: Our support team is available Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM EST.

makeOffer.title: Make Offer
makeOffer.description: Commission is entered in basis points (bps). Your identity stays hidden from the broker until they accept your offer.
makeOffer.commentBlocked: Your comment can't contain {reason}. Please remove it and try again.
makeOffer.fillRequired: Please fill in the required fields (*) before continuing.

survey.title: Closing Survey — {deal}
survey.description: A quick survey about how this deal closed. Your answers help us track lender performance.
survey.qCommitment: Was the commitment issued on time?
survey.qDocReview: Was the document review completed on time?
survey.qFunded: Did the deal fund on time?
survey.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. the borrower went with another lender, or the deal fell through.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitleBroker: Our broker support team is here to help. Reach out through any of the channels below.
contact.subtitleLender: Our lender support team is here to help. Reach out through any of the channels below.
contact.sendMessageSub: Fill out the form and we'll get back to you within 1 business day.
contact.priorityBroker: Priority support available 24/7 for active deal emergencies.
contact.priorityLender: Priority support available 24/7 for active deal and funding emergencies.
contact.thankYouBroker: Thank you, {name}. Our support team will follow up at {email} within 1 business day.
contact.thankYouLender: Thank you, {name}. Our lender support team will follow up at {email} within 1 business day.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Describe your issue or question in as much detail as possible...

signUp.pendingBody: Your lender account is pending approval. An administrator will review your registration — you'll be notified by email once your account is approved, and then you can sign in and start browsing deals.
signUp.title: Partner Registration
signUp.subtitle: Join our secure lending ecosystem and streamline your financial operations.
signUp.agreePost: . I understand that my credentials will be verified against the provided organization.
signUp.errPwTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
signUp.errAgreeTerms: Please agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
signUp.createdConfirm: Account created — please check your email to confirm, then sign in.
signUp.verifyBody: We sent a code to {email}. Enter it below to activate your account.
signUp.errVerify: Invalid or expired code. Please try again.
signUp.errResend: Couldn't resend the code. Please try again.

createDeal.title: Create New Deal
createDeal.subtitle: Complete all sections to submit your mortgage deal for processing.
createDeal.clientDesc: Basic details about the client and transaction type
createDeal.qualifyingDesc: Credit, income, and applicant eligibility details
createDeal.propertyDesc: Details about the property being financed
createDeal.notesBlocked: {label} can't contain {reason}. Please remove it before submitting.
createDeal.fillRequired: Please fill in the required fields (*) before continuing.
createDeal.fillRequiredAll: Some required fields (*) are still empty — complete them to submit.
createDeal.incomeTypeMulti: Income Type — check all that apply
createDeal.creditIssuesHint: (Choose most severe and include in credit notes if multiple)

admin.alertsSubtitle: Content the anti-contact scan flagged (regex or AI). {count} unreviewed.
admin.analyticsSubtitle: Platform activity across deals, offers, invoices, and surveys.
admin.searchInvoices: Search by invoice #, deal #, lender, client…
admin.penaltiesIntro: A lender whose average satisfaction over their last 5 completed surveys is below 3 is penalized automatically (recomputed weekly): they are hidden from — and cannot bid on — near-closing deals (closing within {closing} days, or conditions-of-funding within {cof} days). Lift a penalty here once resolved.
admin.thresholdsDesc: Penalized lenders are hidden from (and can't bid on) deals closing within these windows. Changes apply immediately.
admin.approvalsIntro: Review lenders after email verification. Approved lenders can browse deals and make offers.
admin.rejectDialogDesc: The lender will not be able to access deals. Add a reason (shown to the team).
admin.dealsTotal: Every deal on the platform. {total} total.
admin.dealsTotalShown: Every deal on the platform. {total} total · {shown} shown.
admin.searchDeals: Search by deal #, broker, or brokerage…
admin.surveysTotal: Completed closing surveys across all deals. {total} total.
admin.surveysTotalShown: Completed closing surveys across all deals. {total} total · {shown} shown.
admin.surveysAppearHint: They appear here once brokers complete closing surveys.
admin.faqsIntro: Manage the questions shown on the broker and lender FAQ pages. Choose an audience, then add or edit entries — they appear grouped by category. Drag questions by the handle to reorder them within a category.
admin.question: Question
admin.dragHint: Drag the handle to reorder within a category.
admin.orderSaveErr: Could not save the new order.
admin.legalIntro: Edit the Privacy Policy and Terms & Conditions. Publishing a version makes it the single live document of its type (and unpublishes the previous one).
admin.createFirstDoc: Create the first Privacy Policy or Terms version above.
